privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated configuration values and email contents. I confirmed that the expected signature parameters (Alex Morgan, Marketing Coordinator, TechVision, +1 (555) 234-5678) and email targets (marketing-team@techvision.com, subject 'Introduction') exactly match the explicit instructions in the task description, verifier logic, and hardcoded checks in the export scripts. Additionally, the setup script injects background context emails into the inbox that originate from the real 2002 SpamAssassin public corpus.
